name: diarization-onnx
description: Non-gated speaker diarization ("who spoke when") via a sherpa-onnx segmentation + speaker-embedding pipeline. Install-and-go — no HuggingFace token. Provides a model for the diarization use-case; bind it in Settings → Models.
author: PersonalClaw

x-meta.label: Max speakers
x-meta.help: Upper bound on distinct speakers (0 = auto-cluster).
